# kSecAttrIsExtractable

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s extractability.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrIsExtractable: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFBoolean] and indicates whether the item can be exported from its keychain. Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassKey] have this attribute.
title: kSecAttrIsExtractable
